test.name: LoginTest

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

NoSuchDriverException: Message: Unable to obtain driver for chrome; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.status: NoSuchDriverException: Message: Unable to obtain driver for chrome; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

test.status: NoSuchDriverException: Message: Unable to obtain driver for chrome; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location
